song_name: We Didnt Start The Fire 2020 Version
version_description: The fire is still burning on, and on, and on, and on.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

 [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]  x4


[Verse 1]

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Schools out, scream and shout, Kobe Bryant, Sander's out[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
"Ok Boomer", Soleimani, Mr. Peanut's dead[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Wuhan, China, COVID-19, Harvey Weinstein, royals leave[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
North Korea, North Korea, Bloomberg's gotta go[/tab]


[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]



[Verse 2]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]
Stocks and markets all derailed, Epstein didn't kill himself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Tom Hanks, No broadway shows, and the rest has to to close[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
CDC's got no vaccine, England has the same queen[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Carol Baskin, Mitch McConnell, please don't shoot up Lysol[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire;[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
It was always burning,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Since the world's been turning[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
No we didn't light it,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
But we tried to fight it[/tab]



[Verse 3]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Third impeachment, what a scam, Republicans brainwashed again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Fox and Friends, CNN, don't get a TikTok[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Tax breaks, living wages, did Roy Moore know her age?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Face masks, latex gloves, we just go on walks[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Soap and water, stay home, cough into your elbow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
NHL's off the ice, what's a quid pro quo?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Me Too, plastic straws, anti-abortion laws[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Karens out for protest, stay inside like the rest[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire;[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
It was always burning,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Since the world's been turning[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
No we didn't light it,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
But we tried to fight it[/tab]




[Bridge]

[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
NRA, please step back, quarantine's kinda wack[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Hey Trump, stop the lies, why's there no tan 'round your eyes?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Landlords freeze their rent, no mask for Mike Pence[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
Joe Biden, what's the plan? Another touchy white man[/tab]




[Verse 4]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Melania, where you've you been? Travel ban once again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
Jeff Bezos, what's Zoom?, School is now on Youtube[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
AOC, Pelosi, why's the cabinet empty?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Chubby fingers, small hands, who Tweets at 4AM?[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire;[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
It was always burning,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Since the world's been turning[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
No we didn't light it,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
But we tried to fight it[/tab]


[Verse 5]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
Kushner, Spicer, no one gives us answers[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Celebrities think helping, is just a little singing[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Fires in Austrailia, bread baking mania[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Fascists, riots, whites are never targeted[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Virtual Easter, Brexit, 4/20, was it lit?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Toilet paper goes away, no one's getting sick pay[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire;[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
It was always burning,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Since the world's been turning[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
No we didn't light it,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
But we tried to fight it[/tab]


[Verse 6]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Pro-lifers, kids in cages, CEO's boosting their wages[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
No school shootings, first time in 18 years[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Donald threatens Iran, put's our lives in his tiny hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Vegas hotels empty, still kept homeless in the streets[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Social distance, nail salons, Kemp opens all the malls[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Flint's water still has led, minorities are still oppressed[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
Whites banking on the drug that classifies black men as thugs[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
Morgues and ER's all full, my God it's only April[/tab]



[Outro]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
We didn't start the fire[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
It was always burning,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]

But when we are gone[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Will it still burn on, and on, and on, and on   x3[/tab]
